description: تحويل ملف HTML إلى صورة PNG باستخدام Playwright بدقة 1920x1080
command_preview:
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import os

desktop = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')
html_path = os.path.join(desktop, 'restaurant_design.html')
output_path = os.path.join(desktop, 'restaurant_banner_v3.png')

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1920, 'height': 1080})
    page.goto('file:///' + html_path.replace('\\', '/'))
    page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    page.screenshot(path=output_pat
output:
